column2: # Заменяем NA на 0 только для числовых ковариат
# Все категориальные переменные (i.) перенесены за знак `|` как фиксированные эффекты.
# Знак `^` означает взаимодействие (как # в Stata), создавая эффект для каждого округа.
fmla_pool_gender <- current_score_t ~ INF + INH + INT + INLH + INLT +
# 2. Формула для отдельных округов (Bloom, CH, CPS)
fmla_single_gender <- current_score_t ~ INF + INH + INT + INLH + INLT +
black + hispanic + unknown_race + iep_unknown + iep_yes + free_reduced |
session + grade + school + subject + past_treatment + ar_treatment
# --- Регрессии (используем female == 0 для Male и 1 для Female) ---
mod_pool_male <- feols(fmla_pool_gender, data = filter(bgs_gender, female == 0), cluster = ~cluster_var)
mod_pool_fem  <- feols(fmla_pool_gender, data = filter(bgs_gender, female == 1), cluster = ~cluster_var)
mod_bloom_male <- feols(fmla_single_gender, data = filter(bgs_gender, district == "Bloom" & female == 0), cluster = ~cluster_var)
mod_bloom_fem  <- feols(fmla_single_gender, data = filter(bgs_gender, district == "Bloom" & female == 1), cluster = ~cluster_var)
mod_ch_male <- feols(fmla_single_gender, data = filter(bgs_gender, district == "CH" & female == 0), cluster = ~cluster_var)
mod_ch_fem  <- feols(fmla_single_gender, data = filter(bgs_gender, district == "CH" & female == 1), cluster = ~cluster_var)
mod_cps_male <- feols(fmla_single_gender, data = filter(bgs_gender, district == "CPS" & female == 0), cluster = ~cluster_var)
mod_cps_fem  <- feols(fmla_single_gender, data = filter(bgs_gender, district == "CPS" & female == 1), cluster = ~cluster_var)
